home.heroSubtitle: A complete beginner's guide to building modern websites with React, from zero coding experience to deploying your first app
home.featuresHeading: Everything You Need to Build Modern Websites
home.featureLearnDescription: Clear, jargon-free tutorials that take you from installing your first tool to building complete websites
home.featureCodeDescription: Fill in simple forms and get working React code instantly - no typing required
home.featureAIDescription: Learn how to use ChatGPT and Claude to write code, debug errors, and build features fast
home.featureExamDescription: Take the exam to check what you've learned, review wrong answers, and retake to improve your score
home.featureExamplesDescription: See how to build portfolios, blogs, dashboards, e-commerce sites, and more with full source code
home.featureGlossaryDescription: Every technical term explained in plain English with examples - never feel lost again
home.ctaSubtitle: Start with the Getting Started guide and have your first React app running in 15 minutes
home.heroBadge: Free & Open Source · 33 Chapters · 500+ Code Examples
home.learningPathSubtitle: Follow this roadmap from zero experience to deploying production-ready websites
home.pathStep1Desc: Install tools, set up your environment, and create your first project
home.pathStep2Desc: Learn HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React basics
home.pathStep3Desc: Choose from 13 website types to build
home.pathStep4Desc: Write clean, maintainable, and secure code
home.topicGridSubtitle: 32 in-depth chapters covering everything from personal homepages to production-ready SaaS platforms

common.footerTagline: A free, open-source guide covering 32 chapters and 13 website types — from zero to production-ready.
common.footerCopyright: © {year} React Web Dev Guide. Built for complete beginners.

exam.title: Web Development Exam
exam.description: Test your knowledge across 20 categories with 200 questions drawn from every chapter. You need 70% to pass. Retake anytime to improve your score.
exam.passMessage: You scored {score}% - well done! You have a solid understanding of React web development.
exam.failMessage: You scored {score}% - you need 70% to pass. Review the topics below and try again. You can retake the exam anytime!
exam.noHistory: No exam attempts yet. Take your first exam!
exam.examDescription: Test your web development knowledge with a timed, randomized exam. Each attempt draws 30 questions at random from the question bank. You need 70% to pass.
exam.confirmAllAnswered: Are you sure you want to submit your exam? This action cannot be undone.
exam.confirmPartial: You have answered {answered} of {total} questions. Unanswered questions will be marked incorrect.
exam.passedMessage: Great job! You have demonstrated solid web development knowledge.
exam.failedMessage: You needed 70% to pass. Keep studying and try again!

generator.title: Code Generator
generator.description: Generate single components instantly or scaffold entire project structures with domain-specific templates.
generator.type: What do you want to generate?
generator.chooseDomainDesc: Select the type of project you want to build. Each domain comes with tailored file structures, components, and configuration.
generator.projectNameHelper: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only
generator.domainFeaturesDesc: Select the features to include in your project
generator.selectFilePrompt: Select a file from the tree to view its contents
generator.bottomCtaDesc: The Code Generator creates starter templates. Check out the guides to learn how each piece works and how to build on top of the generated code.
generator.headerDesc: Generate single components instantly or scaffold entire project structures with domain-specific templates, Docker configs, and working code.
generator.quickGenerateInfo: Create individual components, pages, or hooks with real-time preview.
generator.scaffolderInfo: Pick a domain (e.g. E-Commerce, SaaS Dashboard), configure your stack, and generate a full project with Docker, tests, and working code.
generator.configureDesc: Set up your project stack and choose features
generator.domainFeaturesForProject: Select the features to include in your {domain} project
generator.copyAllTooltip: Copy all files as a single text block

bookmarks.title: Your Bookmarks
bookmarks.description: Pages you've saved for quick access. Bookmark any page using the bookmark icon.
bookmarks.empty: No bookmarks yet. Browse the guide and bookmark pages you want to come back to!
bookmarks.browseGuide: Browse the guide and bookmark pages you want to come back to!
bookmarks.clearConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove all bookmarks?
bookmarks.browserSaveNotice: Your bookmarks are saved in your browser. Clearing browser data will remove them.

progress.title: Your Learning Progress
progress.description: Track how far you've come in your React web development journey.
progress.resetConfirm: Are you sure? This will clear all your progress, bookmarks, and exam history.
progress.noProgress: You haven't started learning yet. Head to Getting Started to begin!
progress.resetWarning: This will clear all progress, exam history, and bookmarks. This cannot be undone.

search.hint: Type to search sections by title, description, or topic
search.noResults: No sections found. Try different keywords.
search.startTyping: Start typing to search across the entire guide

glossary.title: Web Development Glossary
glossary.description: Every technical term explained in plain English. No jargon, no assumptions. Use the search to find what you need, or browse by category.
glossary.noResults: No terms found matching your search.
glossary.tryDifferentSearch: Try a different search or select a different category.
glossary.hoverTipSuffix: throughout the guide for instant definitions. This glossary has the full list.
